revisionHistory.changeDescription: Initial deterministic compilation from Creative Brief

campaign.name: Northwind Insight Launch
campaign.description: Q3 product launch for the Northwind Insight dashboard
campaign.objective: Drive qualified trials through clarity-first storytelling

creativeContext.briefTitle: Northwind Analytics — See the Whole Story
creativeContext.briefObjective: Launch the Northwind Insight dashboard to mid-market data teams
creativeContext.creativeDirection: A calm, luminous narrative view emerging from visual noise

references.title: Editorial data storytelling
references.creator: Northwind moodboard
references.description: Calm negative space, one hero insight per frame

keyMessages: See the whole story your data is telling
One narrative view replaces a wall of dashboards
Decisions land 3x faster with a single source of narrative truth
creativeContext.callToAction: Start a free Northwind Insight trial

brandGuidelines.logoUsage: Maintain clear space equal to the height of the N

creativeContext.competitiveContext: Incumbents optimize for breadth of charts, not clarity of story.

constraints.description: Never show competitor dashboards (Stay positive and clarity-focused)
Captions required on all video (WCAG 2.1 AA)
